description: Bright yellow cut-out sneaker for the summer form catwalk! Design details which perfectly merge the features of both a sandal and a shoe have created this stylish piece. Style it with colourblock quirk for maximum effect. Upper Yellow synthetic upper with perforations at the toe box Mesh detail at the sides of the midfoot Central laceups Elastication at the backfoot Padded footbed with embossed branding Outsole TPU outsole with herringbone grooves and suction points at the forefoot and heel Shoe Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
